calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-11-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:09am
Judge Pro Tem David Porter, clerk-Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525. Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Heather Corden, appears with her Attorney Steven Adair McDonald(103502) and Associate Attorney, Anna Lou. Respondent, Rebecca Grinley, appears with her Attorney, Bronwyn Hughes. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Porter.
9:50am
Evidence is retained, matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-16-2012 Judgment Entered
